name: Client ID
description: Akuvo client identifier (prod-N)

name: Run status
description: Pipeline status: ok, no_network, too_few_pairs, or error message

name: Escalation window
description: Max days after A.end for B.start to qualify as escalation

name: Outcome observation window
description: Days from escalation day (B.start) to count outcome events

name: Elapsed time
description: Wall-clock seconds to process this client

name: Accounts (raw)
description: Total unique accounts before business filter

name: Accounts
description: Unique accounts after removing business-primary accounts

name: Business accounts removed
description: Accounts removed by business filter (PRIMARY person isbusiness=True)

name: People
description: Unique person profiles after filter

name: Multi-account people
description: People holding 2+ accounts — the escalation universe

name: % multi-account
description: Percentage of people with 2+ accounts

name: DQ episodes
description: Total delinquency episodes after filter

name: Activities
description: Total collection activities after filter

name: Accounts with DQ
description: Accounts with at least one DQ episode

name: DQ episodes (raw)
description: Total DQ episodes before duration filter

name: DQs filtered (<=1d)
description: DQ episodes removed by duration filter (dq_duration <= 1 day)

name: Network accounts
description: Accounts connected to at least one other account via shared person

name: Network edges
description: Undirected account pairs linked by shared person

name: Network DQs
description: DQ episodes on network accounts

name: Escalation pairs
description: DQ episodes qualifying as escalated (B) with best-match trigger (A)

name: % network DQs escalated
description: Escalation pairs as % of all DQs on network accounts

name: % all DQs escalated
description: Escalation pairs as % of all DQs in the portfolio

name: A trigger duration (mean)
description: Mean DQ duration of trigger episodes (A)

name: A intra-acct baseline (mean)
description: Mean DQ duration of non-escalation episodes on same accounts as A

name: A duration lift
description: Ratio: A trigger mean / A intra-account baseline mean

name: B escalated duration (mean)
description: Mean DQ duration of escalated episodes (B)

name: B intra-acct baseline (mean)
description: Mean DQ duration of non-escalation episodes on same accounts as B

name: B duration lift
description: Ratio: B escalated mean / B intra-account baseline mean

name: Global baseline duration (mean)
description: Mean DQ duration of all non-escalation episodes

name: Negative incidence (escalation)
description: % of esc A+B pairs with >=1 adverse event (terminal or non-terminal) within Z days

name: Negative incidence (random)
description: % of random-baseline pairs with >=1 adverse event within Z days

name: Negative incidence (intra-acct)
description: % of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 adverse event within Z days

name: Negative lift vs random
description: Ratio: escalation adverse incidence / random baseline

name: Negative lift vs intra-account
description: Ratio: escalation adverse incidence / intra-account baseline

name: Negative event count (escalation)
description: Number of esc pairs with >=1 adverse event

name: Negative event count (intra-acct)
description: Number of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 adverse event

name: Negative volume mean (escalation)
description: Mean adverse event count per esc pair (unconditional)

name: Negative volume mean (intra-acct)
description: Mean adverse event count per intra-account baseline DQ (unconditional)

name: Negative volume lift
description: Ratio: esc unconditional adverse volume / intra unconditional

name: Non-terminal incidence (escalation)
description: % of esc pairs with >=1 non-terminal adverse event within Z days

name: Non-terminal incidence (random)
description: % of random-baseline pairs with >=1 non-terminal event within Z days

name: Non-terminal incidence (intra-acct)
description: % of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 non-terminal event within Z days

name: Non-terminal lift vs random
description: Ratio: escalation non-terminal incidence / random baseline

name: Non-terminal lift vs intra-account
description: Ratio: escalation non-terminal incidence / intra-account baseline

name: Non-terminal event count (escalation)
description: Number of esc pairs with >=1 non-terminal event

name: Non-terminal event count (intra-acct)
description: Number of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 non-terminal event

name: Non-terminal volume mean (escalation)
description: Mean non-terminal event count per esc pair (unconditional)

name: Non-terminal volume mean (intra-acct)
description: Mean non-terminal event count per intra-account baseline DQ

name: Non-terminal volume lift
description: Ratio: esc unconditional non-terminal volume / intra unconditional

name: Terminal incidence (escalation)
description: % of esc A+B pairs with >=1 terminal event within Z days

name: Terminal incidence (random)
description: % of random-baseline pairs with >=1 terminal event within Z days

name: Terminal incidence (intra-acct)
description: % of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 terminal event within Z days

name: Terminal lift vs random
description: Ratio: escalation incidence / random baseline incidence

name: Terminal lift vs intra-account
description: Ratio: escalation incidence / intra-account baseline incidence

name: Terminal event count (escalation)
description: Number of esc A+B pairs with >=1 terminal event

name: Terminal event count (intra-acct)
description: Number of intra-account baseline DQs with >=1 terminal event

name: Terminal volume mean (escalation)
description: Mean terminal event count per esc A+B pair (unconditional)

name: Terminal volume mean (intra-acct)
description: Mean terminal event count per intra-account baseline DQ (unconditional)

name: Terminal volume lift
description: Ratio: esc unconditional mean / intra unconditional mean

name: Recurrence % (trigger accounts)
description: % of A-side accounts with >=1 new DQ start within 30d of escalation day

name: Recurrence % (random baseline)
description: % of random-baseline accounts with >=1 new DQ start within 30d

name: Recurrence lift
description: Ratio: trigger recurrence / random baseline recurrence at 30d
